body: Hi, this is William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). I noticed {business_name} has no website. I'll do a free 5-minute audit showing exactly what you're losing each month. Want it? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: PHASE 1 OPTIMIZATION: Lower-friction offer (free audit vs. generic 'see examples')
optimization_rationale: Free audit = lower commitment than 'see examples'
No fake social proof (no '3 Naples gyms' claim)
Clear value: 'showing exactly what you're losing'
Single CTA: Text YES (not multiple options)

variants.body: Hi {business_name} - William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). No website = invisible on Google. I'll create a free 1-page site for you this week. No commitment. Want it? Text YES or call. Reply STOP to opt out.

Quick question for {business_name}: How many customers searched for you on Google last week and found nothing? I'll set up your free Google listing today. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi {business_name} owner - William from Marceau Solutions. 80% of customers check online before calling. I'll build you a simple website for free (no catch). Interested? (239) 398-5676. Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
